pr.title: fix(admin): make Sheet scroll reliably on TMA + sticky CTA in broadcasts composer (P3+P6)
pr.body:
## Summary

Bugs reported on `/admin/deals` (filter sheet — P3) and
`/admin/broadcasts` (composer — P6) on Telegram Mini App boil down to
the same shared root cause: the `Sheet` body sometimes refuses to
scroll on iOS WebView, leaving long forms with their top fields
off-screen and the operator with no visible «Отправить» / «Применить»
affordance.

### `components/ui/Sheet.tsx`

- Add `touch-action: pan-y` as an inline style on the body scroll container. `AdminMenu` sets `document.body.style.overflow = "hidden"` for the duration of the drawer, and Telegram's iOS WebView then sometimes refuses to surface the inner overflow's scroll gestures. `pan-y` opts back in explicitly.
- Add `data-testid="sheet"` + `data-state="open"|"closed"` so the new unit test (and future TMA debugging) can target the panel deterministically.
- Document on the grab handle that it is the only owner of vertical pointer gestures (it was already `touch-none`); the body opt-in `pan-y` complements that contract.

### `lib/animate.ts` — `useVerticalDrag` / `useHorizontalSwipe`

- On pointer-up, **clear** the inline transform (`style.transform = ""`) instead of pinning it to `translateY(0)` / `translateX(0)`. The old reset left an inline style on the panel root that *overrode* the consumer's `translate-y-full` / `translate-x-full` open/closed Tailwind class on the very next render. The visible consequence: after a drag-down dismiss the Sheet sometimes "stuck" on screen until the next mount cycle.

### `pages/admin/AdminBroadcastsPage.tsx` — Composer

- **Sticky-footer CTA**: «Отправить» / «Предпросмотр» now live in a `sticky bottom-0` row, so they stay anchored to the bottom of the Sheet viewport while the form above scrolls. Without this, the body field forced the CTA below the fold on TMA.
- **Live char-counter** under «Текст» showing `NNN/4096`. The counter turns red and disables both CTAs once the body exceeds the backend limit (mirrors `AdminBroadcastCreateIn._body_ok` in `backend/app/schemas.py`).
- **Inline deeplink validator**: mirrors `AdminBroadcastCreateIn._deeplink_ok` (≤256 chars, must start with `https://` or `tg://`) and disables both CTAs while invalid. Surfaces the same error string the backend would return so the operator can fix it without a round-trip.

### Tests

- `src/components/ui/Sheet.test.tsx` (new): mount lifecycle, `data-state` attribute, `touch-action: pan-y` on the scroller, backdrop click + Escape both fire `onClose`.
- `src/pages/admin/AdminBroadcastsPage.test.tsx`: two new cases — char-counter advances + blocks submit past 4096, and deeplink inline-validates with both CTAs following the error state. Existing happy-path tests still cover preview / send / role chips.

Local `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, and `npx vitest run` (501 tests) all green.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Open `/admin/broadcasts` in TMA, tap «Новая». Verify «Отправить» / «Предпросмотр» are visible at the bottom of the sheet without scrolling, that the body field is reachable, and that the char-counter under «Текст» updates as you type.
- [ ] Paste `http://example.com` into «Глубокая ссылка», confirm the inline error «Ссылка должна начинаться с https:// или tg://» appears and both CTAs disable; replace with `https://t.me/...` and confirm the error clears + CTAs re-enable.
- [ ] Open `/admin/deals` in TMA, tap the filter icon (top-right). Sheet should slide up and scroll cleanly — fill «Валюта», «Мин/Макс», toggle «Только с арбитражем», tap «Применить», confirm the filter chips show on the list. (P3 was reported as «no reaction» on this tap; if it still misbehaves after this PR the next thing to check is the AdminMenu drawer state.)
- [ ] Sanity-check `/deals/new` (`CreateDealPage`) → `Контрагент` picker still works (the picker shares the same Sheet primitive indirectly via the `UserPicker` dropdown).
- [ ] Drag a Sheet down by its grab handle past ~120 px → it should dismiss cleanly, and re-opening the same sheet should re-animate from the bottom (not appear instantly).

### Notes

P3 was originally reported as "filter button doesn't react". The button itself (`AdminDealsPage.tsx`) is wired correctly to `setFilterOpen(true)` — I could not find a code-level bug there. The most likely root cause is the same TMA Sheet scroll/touch issue this PR addresses; if reaching the filter button is the actual issue (e.g. behind the `AdminMenu` z-index), please re-test post-merge and ping me with a screen recording so I can investigate the exact failure mode.

This PR intentionally does NOT change the AdminMenu z-index or the page-level scroll-lock, since both seem fine in isolation. Happy to follow up if the post-merge test shows otherwise.


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/18a86fe3f3364c29a771ba31944c295d
Requested by: @g2void2-byte
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
